headline: Is GE Aerospace (GE) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is GE a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on GE Aerospace on r/investing_discussion by Variant_Invest. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on GE. GE Aerospace’s share was trading at $314.49 as of May 26th. GE’s trailing and forward P/E were 37.62 and 40.82 respectively according to Yahoo Finance. General […]
